name: Mark Altrogge
title: Pastor & Songwriter
tagline: Sovereign Grace songwriter whose hymns have blessed churches for decades
bio: Pastor and prolific songwriter associated with Sovereign Grace Churches. He is best known for writing 'I Stand in Awe,' a worship song that has been sung across denominations worldwide. Altrogge has authored hundreds of worship songs combining Reformed theology with heartfelt devotion.
faith: Altrogge's songs reflect deep Reformed conviction and a pastor's heart for helping congregations see the greatness of God. His hymn 'I Stand in Awe' captures the wonder of God's holiness and grace in a way that has resonated with believers for decades. He continues to serve as a pastor while writing songs that exalt Christ and edify the church.

sources.title: The Blazing Center — Mark Altrogge's Blog
sources.note: Mark Altrogge's personal blog on faith and worship

sources.title: Sovereign Grace Music
sources.note: Publisher of many of Altrogge's worship songs
